content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule with atom 11 (Sulfur) visible. Looking at the connections, I can see that atom S:11 is bonded to:

- C:3 (Carbon, index 3)
- C:8 (Carbon, index 8)

Let me confirm the geomconf_index for this molecule. Based on the file name "geomconf_8706.xyz", the geomconf_index is 8706.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 11 (Sulfur) are:
- Atom index 3, element C (Carbon)
- Atom index 8, element C (Carbon)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 8706.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be S. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
